name: User reviews notifications and marks them read
description: Notification bell shows an unread count. Opening the drawer shows a chronological list grouped by type (opens, payments, signatures). Marking read syncs across tabs.

persona.name: Lena Park
persona.context: Comes back to her laptop after lunch. Sees a 5 on the bell.

preconditions: 5 unread notifications: 2 quote opens, 1 signature, 1 payment, 1 stale-quote nudge

steps.expect: Drawer slides in from the right; unread items have a subtle dot or background

steps.action: Clicks a 'Browning signed your contract' notification
steps.expect: Navigates to that contract; notification marks read
Bell count drops to 0; drawer entries dim but remain visible

steps.action: User has a second tab open on /quotes
steps.expect: That tab's bell also drops to 0 within a few seconds (cross-tab sync)

evaluationCriteria.check: Unread vs read styling is distinguishable without relying on color alone
Drawer doesn't push page content — it overlays
Notifications older than 7 days are collapsed under 'Earlier' and load on demand
Drawer traps focus while open; Esc closes it and returns focus to the bell
